<!-- source-snippet repo="canton" path="docs-open/target/snippet_json_data/participant/howtos/secure/keys/key_management.json" commit="268d267439898d0927bd547f3d7a30ff469b46aa" snippet="docs-open/target/snippet_json_data/participant/howtos/secure/keys/key_management-5" location="jsonIndex:5-5" -->
```scala
@ val key = myNode.keys.secret.generate_signing_key(
      "mySigningKeyName",
      SigningKeyUsage.ProtocolOnly,
      Some(SigningKeySpec.EcCurve25519)
    )
    key : SigningPublicKey = SigningPublicKey(
      id = 1220b8113819...,
      format = DER-encoded X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo,
      keySpec = EC-Curve25519,
      usage = Set(signing, proof-of-ownership)
    )
```

```scala
@ myNode.topology.owner_to_key_mappings.add_key(key.fingerprint, key.purpose)
```
